safeDrivingPromise.acceptedSubtitle: Thank you for choosing responsibility. You're making our roads safer.
safeDrivingPromise.defaultSubtitle: Commit to safer roads and unlock an instant discount on your challan payment.
safeDrivingPromise.checkboxText: I promise to drive responsibly, follow traffic rules, and contribute to safer roads.
safeDrivingPromise.checkboxHint: Accept the promise to unlock your discount
safeDrivingPromise.lockedHint: Make the promise above to unlock
safeDrivingPromise.thankYouMessage: Thank you for choosing responsible driving

items.text: I will never drink and drive.
I will avoid using my phone while driving.
I will respect traffic signals and speed limits.
I will be patient and avoid unnecessary honking.
I will respect pedestrians and fellow road users.
I will drive responsibly for my safety and that of others.
I will help make Indian roads safer.

whyCards.title: Your safety affects everyone
whyCards.desc: Driving responsibly protects your own life, the lives of your loved ones, and the safety of every person sharing the road.

whyCards.title: Your behaviour influences others
whyCards.desc: Safe, calm, and disciplined driving encourages others to behave the same way. Leading by example creates a culture of responsibility.

whyCards.title: Contributing to a safer India
whyCards.desc: Thousands of responsible choices together can transform the way people drive. You become part of a larger movement.

commitments.title: I will never drink and drive or drive under the influence
commitments.desc: I respect life, both my own and the lives of others. I will always choose safety, judgment, and responsibility over impulsive or dangerous choices.

commitments.title: I will avoid unnecessary honking and remain patient
commitments.desc: I understand that excessive honking and aggressive behaviour create stress, anger, and unsafe driving conditions.

commitments.title: I will stop at pedestrian crossings and give way where required
commitments.desc: Roads are shared by everyone. I will respect pedestrians and other vulnerable road users.

commitments.title: I will not overtake dangerously or from blind spots
commitments.desc: Saving a few seconds is never worth putting lives at risk. I will drive in a predictable, safe, and lawful manner.

commitments.title: I will keep my vehicle properly maintained
commitments.desc: Road safety begins with a roadworthy vehicle. I will ensure my vehicle is serviced regularly.

commitments.title: I will follow speed limits responsibly
commitments.desc: Speed limits exist to protect lives, not just to avoid penalties. I will choose control over carelessness.

commitments.title: I will use indicators and signals clearly
commitments.desc: Safe driving depends on clear communication. I will always use indicators and signals properly.

commitments.title: I will use high beams responsibly
commitments.desc: I understand that improper use of high beams can create discomfort and danger for others.

commitments.title: I will stop driving if I feel tired, distracted, or unwell
commitments.desc: If I feel drowsy, mentally distracted, or unfit to continue, I will pull over safely.

commitments.title: I will treat traffic police and enforcement officers respectfully
commitments.desc: Even in disagreement, I will remain respectful and cooperative with authorities.

commitments.title: I will keep all vehicle documents updated and available
commitments.desc: I will stay legally compliant by ensuring my vehicle papers are valid and ready.

commitments.title: I will act responsibly in the event of an accident
commitments.desc: I will respond with responsibility and humanity. I will not run away or worsen the situation.

commitments.title: I will never use my phone while driving, including at red lights
commitments.desc: No call, message, or notification is worth risking a life. I will stay focused on the road.

commitments.title: I will encourage at least one other person each month to value road safety
commitments.desc: Real change grows through awareness and action. I will help spread the message of safe driving.

commitments.title: I will drive with humility, empathy, and awareness
commitments.desc: Every vehicle on the road carries a human being, a family, and a story. I will remember that.

progressSection.title: This Promise Is About Progress, Not Perfection
progressSection.text: Making a road safety promise does not mean claiming to be perfect. It means choosing to be more conscious, more thoughtful, and more committed every time you drive. It is a promise to keep improving and to stay aware of how your actions affect others.

expectFromUs.title: What You Can Expect From Us
items: Offering fast, transparent, and easy-to-access support for your legal concerns
Sharing helpful tools, updates, and information that promote awareness and informed driving
Supporting road safety efforts alongside communities, authorities, and responsible citizens
Recognizing and encouraging people who lead with responsibility on the road

closingSection.title: You Are Doing More Than Resolving a Challan
closingSection.text: By making this promise, you are choosing to stand for responsibility, awareness, and safer roads in India. Your actions behind the wheel reflect who you are: careful, aware, and committed to doing better.
closingSection.thankYou: Thank you for being part of the change India needs. 🙏
